Meet the Founder

Skye

Biochemical Engineer · Educator · Mother · Village Builder

Colorado School of Mines Biochemical Engineer Mother of 3 STEAM Pioneer Faith-Driven Farm to Future

She graduated from Colorado School of Mines with a biochemical engineering degree — and a fire for education that no laboratory could contain. She pioneered STEAM workshops, became a private educator during COVID, built programs from coding to farm-to-table. Then she became a mother — three children, in a row — and felt the gap herself. The village wasn't there. So she built one.

"I was looking for a nanny — and I got a village instead. So I built one."

— Skye, Founder · Legacies Learning Villages

The Story Behind the Village

She didn't just study this.
She lived every word of it.

The Foundation
Colorado School of Mines — Biochemical Engineering
Skye didn't just attend one of the most rigorous engineering schools in the country — she graduated with a fire for education that couldn't be contained in a lab. The science background gave her something most educators never have: a systems mind. She sees child development the way an engineer sees a process — designed, intentional, optimized for real outcomes.
Pioneering
STEAM Workshops & Private Education
Before it was a movement, Skye was in schools running STEAM workshops — bringing science, technology, art, and math together in ways children actually loved. When COVID shut the world down, she pivoted immediately into private teaching, showing up for families when the system couldn't. She never stopped showing up.
The Real Education
Three Children. In a Row. Everything Changed.
She hired the nannies. She worked from home with an infant in her arms. She tried the drop-in programs. She toured the daycares. And she felt what millions of parents feel but cannot name — this system was not built for families. It was built for convenience. One person, isolated, trying to do the job of five. No continuity. No curriculum. No village. Just a transaction dressed up as care.
The Realization
We Were Never Meant to Do This Alone.
The nuclear family was never designed to operate in isolation. Cooking, cleaning, childcare, education, transportation, emotional support — one person cannot carry all of this. What families need is what families used to have before modern life stripped it away: a village. Not a service. Not an employee. A real, present, invested community that shows up and stays.
The Leap
Her Own Family Became the First Village.
Skye's family took the leap of faith first. Her parents stepped in — not as employees, but as village. Her children became the living proof. Legacies Learning Villages isn't a concept she dreamed up in a boardroom. It's a reality she already lives, breathes, and builds every single day. She is the founding family. Her children are the founding students.
Today
From Farm to Future — Programs That Actually Mean Something.
From coding classes to farm-to-table programs, Skye creates curriculum that keeps children rooted in the real world while fully prepared for the digital one. STEAM Montessori. Life skills. Enrichment that lasts a lifetime. Over ten years of private education — and now she's building the center that lets her do it for every family in the community.

The Moment That Changes Everything

"I was looking
for a nanny —
and I got a village instead."

That's what every Legacies family says. Because that's what every Legacies family gets. Not one person. Not a transaction. A whole community that shows up, knows your child by name, and builds your legacy right alongside you.

🌿 Legacies Learning Villages · Manvel, TX

What She Believes

The village isn't a service.
It's a way of life.

🌱 Children Need More Than Supervision

A warm body in the room is not education. Every single hour of a child's day is a developmental opportunity — and Skye designs every one of them with intention, from morning circle to afternoon enrichment.

🤝 You Deserve a Partner, Not an Employee

The nanny model creates dependency — they might leave, you start over, your child loses someone they love again. Legacies creates partnership. We are invested in your family's future because your flourishing is our flourishing.

🌾 Rooted & Reaching — Farm to Future

From farm-to-table cooking to advanced coding curriculum — children thrive when they're grounded in the real world and reaching toward the digital one. Both belong. Both matter. Skye teaches both.

🏘️ The Nuclear Family Was Never Meant to Go It Alone

This is her core conviction — and the reason Legacies exists. The isolation of modern parenting is not natural, not sustainable, and not necessary. You were always meant to have a village. We're yours.

Faith · Family · Purpose

"God is my saviour. My family is my foundation. This village is my calling."

Skye is married, a woman of deep faith, and a mother of three. Every decision in Legacies flows from that center — love for family, trust in purpose, and an unshakeable conviction that community changes everything.

✦ New Parent Exclusive

Snuggle Between
Meetings.

You went back to work — but your heart stayed with your baby. We built something just for you. Because the hardest part of returning to work shouldn't be wondering if your child is okay. They are. And you can be close.

🏡 In-Home Village Aide

A trusted village member comes to your home while you work remotely. Close your laptop for 20 minutes. Snuggle your baby. Get back to your meeting. You're still a professional. You're also still a mother.

🖥️ Work From Our Village

Our upstairs private offices are reserved for moms who need to be close. Steps away from your child. Pop in between calls. Never too far. Always close enough to feel it.

Investment

All plans are flat weekly rates — no surprise hourly add-ups, no instability. You know exactly what you're paying, and exactly what you're getting: a whole village, every week.

How It Works

Joining your village
is simple.

1

Reach Out

Text or email Skye. Tell us about your child, your schedule, and what you need. No forms. No pressure. Just a real conversation between parents.

2

Meet the Village

Come meet Skye and the team. See where your child will learn, play, and grow. Ask every question — we want you to feel completely, fully at peace.

3

Choose Your Plan

We'll build a schedule that fits your family's actual life. Sign a simple enrollment agreement and your spot is yours.

4

Welcome Home.

Your child starts. You get daily updates, a real relationship with our team, and the peace of mind you have been searching for since the day you became a parent.
